hooks.command: input=$(cat); session_id=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.session_id // "unknown"'); marker="/tmp/claude-vault-hook-${session_id}"; if [ -f "$marker" ]; then exit 0; fi; dir="$PWD"; found=""; while true; do if [ -L "$dir/.vault-project" ]; then found="$dir/.vault-project"; break; fi; [ "$dir" = "/" ] && break; dir="$(dirname "$dir")"; done; if [ -z "$found" ]; then exit 0; fi; touch "$marker"; target="$(readlink "$found")"; reason="This session ran inside a project directory linked via .vault-project to the vault project at ${target}. Draft a short dated log.md entry (1-3 bullets: what happened, what was decided, what's next) and any todo.md updates based on this session. Show the user the draft and ask for confirmation before writing to ${target}/log.md or ${target}/todo.md - do not write silently. If nothing meaningful happened this session, say so and skip the draft."; jq -n --arg reason "$reason" '{decision:"block", reason:$reason}'
